title: Gooey Spicy Wheat Stir-fry
description: A sour and gooey Ethiopian-inspired dish featuring cayenne pepper for a spicy kick, perfect for hangover cure and keto-friendly.
instructions: Add olive oil to a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Once heated, add the wheat pasta and cayenne pepper. Cook for about 2 minutes until it starts to develop some color on the edges.
Stir in the ground black pepper and almond milk. Allow to simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Stir in nutritional yeast and lemon juice/zest mixture, then let cook for another minute to combine flavors.
Transfer the dish to a baking dish lined with parchment paper, spread evenly.
Bake in preheated oven for about 10-15 minutes or until golden brown on top. Remove from heat and serve.
